definition.name: def-near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: A = Im P = Ker(1-P) subseteq V=B(H)_sa, a real subspace containing 1, the range of the spectral idempotent P (def-spectral-idempotent). The order, unit, and order-unit norm on A are inherited EXACTLY from V=B(H)_sa. Reference: definitions/def-near-fixed-algebra.md; report sec:spectral, sec:epsjb.
